text:
Sylvia Krieger is a soldier of the Survey Corps and the sister of Lucas Krieger. She is a protagonist of the Attack on Titan motion comic "Bergheim."

Appearance

Sylvia has tanned skin, wavy brown hair and purple eyes. She wears the standard Survey Corps uniform with a green cloak and white clothes.

Story

Sylvia heads to Bergheim at night with Bonnie. As they are about to arrive, they come across a Titan. Sylvia injures it but the Titan flees before she can finish it.

Wondering where did it go, the two women come in Bergheim and begin to seek Sylvia's brother, Lucas. Noticing a trail of smoke, they decide to follow it. They come across an abandoned house with food. Sylvia thinks of eating it, arguing that no one would bother them for that but Bonnie is more suspicious.

Feeling tired, Sylvia falls asleep but Bonnie awakes her. They decide to go up and watch out their surroundings. Bonnie begins the watch and Sylvia rests until Bonnie sees a Titan seemingly glowing.
